text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day before Satono Diamond's first G1 race,
her parents call her to cheer her on

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond's parents have contributed much
to the world of Umamusume, so she'd like to
reward them with a G1 victory.
